name: Subway Surfers Blast
author: Poki
description: Subway Surfers Blast is a colorful merge puzzle game where you team up with your favorite Subway Surfers characters like Jake, Yutani, Fresh, and Tricky! Tap on two or more matching elements to blast through vibrant levels, clear rows and columns, and unleash explosive power-ups that take out tons of pieces at once. Each character comes with special abilities to help you conquer tougher challenges. Ready to match, blast, and have a blast? How to play Subway Surfers Blast? Click or tap on two or more matching tiles! Who created Subway Surfers Blast? Subway Surfers Blast is created by Sybo. Play their other games on Poki: Subway Surfers ! How can I play Subway Surfers Blast for free? You can play Subway Surfers Blast for free on Poki. Can I play Subway Surfers Blast on mobile devices and desktop? Subway Surfers Blast can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
